positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a sleepy, ethereal fox curled up amidst a cluster of glowing mushrooms and bioluminescent forest flora. The style should be modern whimsical botanical illustration, reminiscent of vintage scientific drawings but with a neon pop twist. Focus on clean, distinct silhouettes and a high contrast palette: deep indigo and forest green backdrop contrasted sharply with pops of electric magenta, lime green, and glowing gold accents. Central composition, perfect for an apparel print. Soft rim lighting emanating from the glow mushrooms, emphasizing the fur texture and the delicacy of the leaves. Highly stylized, vector art quality, print-ready, symmetrical elements.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, signature, logo, trademark, blurry, grain
